## Checklist

- [ ] `SKILL.md` exists at the skill root
- [ ] If adding a plugin: `plugin.json` exists and is valid
- [ ] If adding a plugin: all skills listed in `plugin.json` have a `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Branch name follows convention (`skill/`, `plugin/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `docs/`)
- [ ] Tested locally and works as expected
